bars.label: shuffled covariates
bars.caveat: marginals preserved; only the joint dependence is broken (mild OOD)

bars.label: far-tail synthetic
bars.caveat: synthetic far-tail patients (+/-3..5 sigma); strong shift by design

bars.label: held-out subgroup
bars.caveat: real covariate-defined subpopulation (top decile of most-variable covariate); a covariate shift within one dataset, not a new source
